Event: Enchanted Hustle
Event Date: 12/08/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AM223
Dense Hustle Amulet

Once in a while, the unit removes all freezing effects from themselves and becomes immune to them for 5 sec.

When any allied unit is frozen, the amulet owner casts deep freeze on 3 random enemies for 4 sec. The frozen units can't move or attack, and the cooldown of all their abilities (except those granted by the equipped set) is increased by 4 sec. When the deep freeze effect wears off, the targets of the ability explode and take 500000 magic damage, and icicles fly out of them, hitting 2 nearby enemies. On hit, the icicles deal 325000 magic damage, increase the cooldown of the targets' gear and artifact abilities by 4 sec, and cast stiffness on them. The attack speed of stiffened units is reduced by 55% for 4 sec. Can be triggered only once in 9 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
